title: Exploration Reborn
description: In this mod you will start with barely being able to survive slowly progressing and finding new structures and biomes that completely change the game's feeling. You will find and venture through new dungeons, ships and towns that feel alive.
body:
This mod is a project that I have been working on for quite a while. As a team of one I had a hard time looking for the right mods, so I am very proud to say that it is finally a finished product!

 In this mod you will start with barely being able to survive slowly progressing and finding new structures and biomes that completely change the game's feeling. You will find new dungeons, ships and towns that feel alive. Although survival might be hard at first, you will perservere and find the true adventure in the Minecraft world. In this customizable experience you will find that there isn't much to be fixed or added, leaving a clean and polished look to the game.

Thank You to all the creators of the mods used; I would like to formally state that I had no part in the creation of these mods and have only taken them and combined them to make this modpack.

I hope you enjoy this pack that I worked so hard on to perfect as much as I could.

Thank You.

Sorry for not being able to give individual credit for all of the mods, there seems to have been a technical error when downloading the mods which has cause all their names to change in the files, and manually looking at each mod and creator would take a large amount of time which I do not have.
